'''tazhawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pobblebonk|pobblebonk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pobblebonk|pobblebonk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tazhawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzhæwæth|tæzhæwæth]] || [[word:tæzhæwæj|tæzhæwæj]] || [[word:tæzhæwæsh|tæzhæwæsh]] || [[word:tæzhæwæ|tæzhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhazhawath|tazhazhawath]] || [[word:tazhazhawaj|tazhazhawaj]] || [[word:tazhazhawash|tazhazhawash]] || [[word:tazhazhawa|tazhazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhawath|tazhawath]] || [[word:tazhawaj|tazhawaj]] || [[word:tazhawash|tazhawash]] || [[word:tazhawa|tazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhafwath|tazhafwath]] || [[word:tazhafwaj|tazhafwaj]] || [[word:tazhafwash|tazhafwash]] || [[word:tazhafwaf|tazhafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazhawatha|tazhawatha]] || [[word:tazhawaja|tazhawaja]] || [[word:tazhawasha|tazhawasha]] || [[word:tazhawaka|tazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazhawath|tazhawath]] || [[word:tazhawaj|tazhawaj]] || [[word:tazhawash|tazhawash]] || [[word:tazhawa|tazhawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazhawathal|tazhawathal]] || [[word:tazhawajal|tazhawajal]] || [[word:tazhawashal|tazhawashal]] || [[word:tazhawakal|tazhawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazhawathatha|tazhawathatha]] || [[word:tazhawajaja|tazhawajaja]] || [[word:tazhawashasha|tazhawashasha]] || [[word:tazhawaka|tazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazhawathan|tazhawathan]] || [[word:tazhawajan|tazhawajan]] || [[word:tazhawashan|tazhawashan]] || [[word:tazhawakan|tazhawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazhawathaoro|tazhawathaoro]] || [[word:tazhawajaoro|tazhawajaoro]] || [[word:tazhawashaoro|tazhawashaoro]] || [[word:tazhawakaoro|tazhawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
